repo_prior_art.cite: none; doc/API.md §3 says ExactID/PartialID catalogues are seed-time empty, and cited eid_lp_svar_nonequiv_v1/eid_dml_orth_uniform_v1 are unrelated LP-SVAR/DML proposals

published_prior_art.cite: BorusyakHull2023Econometrica + BorusyakHullJaravel2025ECTJ: recentered formula instruments subtract the expected instrument/treatment under the shock assignment process, and non-recentered bias is exactly the expected-instrument residual loading

BorusyakHull2023Econometrica + BorusyakHullJaravel2025ECTJ: the sharp recentered-instrument validity condition is mean-zero conditional on the design information; the Pi-null condition is the linear shift-share specialization of that characterization

repo_prior_art.cite: none; no in-catalogue two-shock formula-IV witness

published_prior_art.cite: BorusyakHull2023Econometrica: the proposed two-shock witness is an immediate finite-dimensional illustration of the known recentering-validity boundary, not a new published theorem

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The moment decomposition is the standard recentered-formula-IV bias algebra from BorusyakHull2023Econometrica/BorusyakHullJaravel2025ECTJ written with q_B=0, q_R=m_R, q_D=m_D.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The claimed sharp uniform Pi-null frontier is subsumed by the published necessary-and-sufficient recentered-instrument validity condition; Pi-null is just the linear-share way to say the expected formula instrument is zero on all exposure rows.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The §8 comparison says BorusyakHull2023Econometrica/BorusyakHullJaravel2025ECTJ do not state an iff frontier, but their recentered formula-instrument characterization is already an iff validity boundary; the proposal only rewrites it in Pi notation.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The witness targets a generic recentered-versus-design separation rather than a specific published estimator/workflow claim that asserts equality under positive leakage; it is a pedagogical example of known recentering bias.

novelty_flags.label: proposal
novelty_flags.one_line: The survey misses the closest formulation of the issue inside the published formula-instrument characterization itself: the class of valid formula instruments is exactly the recentered/mean-zero class.

novelty_flags.label: proposal
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=not-publishable below novelty_target=flagship; to reach flagship the kernel would need a new estimator frontier beyond the already-published recentering-validity characterization.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Pivot from recentering validity to a genuinely new frontier, e.g. an efficiency-bound or influence-function equivalence/non-equivalence theorem between two named published formula-IV estimators under nested shock designs.

If keeping the leakage geometry, state it explicitly as a short expository corollary of Borusyak-Hull rather than a flagship conjecture, and remove novelty language claiming the iff boundary is absent from the literature.

Replace the two-shock witness with a named published workflow that actually treats coarse recentering and rich design conditioning as interchangeable, then prove an open-class obstruction against that workflow.

recommended_next_step: Reject this angle and pivot; the current kernel is a Pi-notation restatement of the published recentered formula-instrument validity boundary, not a flagship-novel research question.
